summary: SEO/indexing validation for Vibify SPA: robots.txt, sitemap.xml, per-page metadata (title/description/canonical/OG/Twitter), JSON-LD (Organization on home + Service on each service page), /admin noindex, and regression on visible content + contact/booking POST APIs. All criteria PASS.

robots_txt.note: Cloudflare prepends a managed content-signals block, but required 'Disallow: /admin' and 'Sitemap: https://vibifymarketing.com/sitemap.xml' are appended at the end as expected

homepage.title: Vibify — Marketing & PR Agency That Makes Brands Viral

metadata_verification.uniqueness_check: 9 unique titles across 9 of 9 pages; 9 unique descriptions across 9 of 9 pages

critical_code_review_comments: Seo.jsx uses absolute production URL (https://vibifymarketing.com) hardcoded for canonical/OG even on preview — this is intentional per the request but means the preview environment can't be used to test relative-URL changes. Consider sourcing SITE from env (e.g. REACT_APP_SITE_URL) so non-prod deployments are correct without code edits.

Cloudflare prepends a managed robots.txt block before the project's custom rules. The required 'Disallow: /admin' and 'Sitemap' lines appear correctly at the end, but the duplicated 'User-agent: *' block could be slightly confusing for some crawlers. Consider verifying behaviour in Google Search Console.

social-media-marketing seo.title is shorter (only 30 chars 'Social Media Marketing — Vibify'); the other 7 service pages use the longer pattern 'X Agency — Y | Vibify'. Optional tightening for SEO consistency.

robots.txt + sitemap.xml hardcode production domain in static files (expected) — but they're served from every environment. A cross-environment crawl could mis-discover. Consider build-time templating or environment-aware sitemap if needed.
test_credentials: No auth required for this test.
seed_data_creation: Created 2 TEST_-prefixed submissions in DB via /api/contact and /api/booking during regression (TEST_SEO_Regression contact, TEST_SEO_Booking booking)
context_for_next_testing_agent: All SEO requirements verified on rendered DOM via Playwright on preview (dev server, JS executed). Static files robots.txt/sitemap.xml served from public/ pass with correct Content-Types. The preview is behind Cloudflare which PREPENDS a managed robots block — project-required lines are appended at end and present. React 19 native <title>/<meta>/<link> hoist is working correctly. Production prerender via react-snap was NOT verified here (main agent confirms it's verified via build artifacts separately).
